overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie at night. The character follows a lantern-lit wagon that eventually turns off the path, then continues alone toward a distant rocky settlement under a starry sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with wagon traffic

events.description: horse-drawn wagon turns right and exits the main path
rider on horseback crosses the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: following the horse-drawn wagon along the dirt road at night, maintaining a steady pace behind it

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with lantern light moving ahead and turning off the path to the right
horse with rider galloping across the path from right to left

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail winding through tall grass prairie
wooden freight wagon with canvas cover and lit side lantern
sparse oak trees dotting the rolling prairie landscape
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy walking behind a horse-drawn wagon on a dirt trail at night. The wagon's lantern provides a warm glow against the cool blue moonlight. As the wagon turns off the path, a horse rider crosses from right to left, leaving the character alone on the open prairie with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie path approaching rocky settlement

agents.ego_description: walking alone along the dirt path toward the distant rocky outcrop and settlement

entered.detail: large rock formation visible on the left horizon near the distant settlement

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alone along the dirt trail through the open prairie. The wagon and rider have departed, leaving an empty landscape. The path stretches ahead toward a distant rocky outcrop on the left, with mountains silhouetted against the starry night sky. The scene is quiet and isolated, with only the sound of footsteps on the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rocky hillside with scattered wooden structures

agents.ego_description: approaching the rocky outcrop as it looms larger on the left side of the path

entered.detail: small wooden building or shack near the base of the rock formation

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character draws closer to the rocky outcrop, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A small wooden structure becomes visible near the rocks. The path continues toward the settlement, with the terrain gradually becoming more rugged. The night sky remains clear with scattered clouds as the character maintains a steady walking pace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie that transitions from a guided journey to a solitary approach toward a rugged settlement. It begins behind a cowboy following a horse-drawn wagon, where the warm glow of a lantern contrasts with the cool blue moonlight of the dirt trail. As the wagon turns off the path and a lone rider crosses the frame, the scene opens into an empty, isolated landscape with distant mountains silhouetted against a starry sky. The camera then tracks the character walking alone across the open prairie, where the flat terrain gradually shifts as a rocky outcrop begins to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the path leads toward a small wooden structure nestled among the rocks, with the ground becoming increasingly rugged under a clear night sky with scattered clouds.
